name: Can AI build a jet engine? JARVIS Challenge tests role of AI copilots in tough-tech engineering
summary: MIT students designed, built, and tested a jet engine with AI copilots, assessing AI’s usefulness in developing high-performance aerospace systems.
description: MIT students designed, built, and tested a jet engine with AI copilots, assessing AI’s usefulness in developing high-performance aerospace systems.
author: Department of Aeronautics and Astronautics
